brand.baseline: Join the life of your neighbourhood.
brand.point_services: Services, events and messaging in one place

register.title: Create an account
register.error: Could not create the account. This email may already be in use.
register.success: Account created. You can now sign in.

totp.title: Two-step verification
totp.prompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
totp.setup_prompt: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, etc.).
totp.setup_then: Then enter the 6-digit code it shows to confirm.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.prompt: Enter your email: we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sent: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has just been sent.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.error: The link is invalid or has expired.

sso.scan_instructions: Scan this QR code with your already connected device
sso.expired: The request has expired (2-minute deadline exceeded).
sso.generic_error: An error occurred. Please try again.
sso.preview_message: {{device}} wants to access your Nabor Services account.
sso.success_message: {{device}} is now connected to your account.
sso.missing_token: Session token missing. Please rescan the QR code.
sso.unauthorized: You must be signed in to authorize a device.
